allow: Bash(perl -i -pe 's/^<script>$/<script>\\n  \\/\\/ Set update time and build ID\\n  const now = new Date\(\);\\n  const updateTime = now.toLocaleString\("en-US", {hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit", second: "2-digit", hour12: true}\);\\n  const buildId = "v" + now.toISOString\(\).substr\(0,10\).replace\(/-/g,""\);\\n  document.getElementById\("updateInfo"\).innerHTML = `Updated: ${updateTime} | Build: ${buildId}`;\\n/ if $. == 377' index.html)
Bash(perl -i.bak -ne 'print; if \($. == 377\) { while\(<>\) { print; last; } open\(F, "</tmp/update_info.txt"\) or die; while\(<F>\) { print } close\(F\); }' index.html)
